pdf.body:
<#list record.recmachcustrecord_njt_packing_list_drt?chunk(25) as itemBatch>




    
    
        

            
                
            
        
    

    
    
        

            
                PACKING LIST
            
        
    

    
    
        

            DATE :
            ${record.custrecord_njt_packing_list_date}
        
        

            INVOICE NO :
            ${record.custrecord_njt_packing_list_inv}
        
        

            PO NO :
            ${record.custrecord_njt_packing_list_client_po}
        
    

    
    


    
    
        
            

                SI. NO
                ITEM
                SIZE
                UNIT
                BOX QTY
                TOTAL BOX
                TOTAL QTY
            
        
        
        <#-- Dynamic Item Rendering -->
        <#list itemBatch as item>
            

                ${item_index + 1 + (itemBatch?index * 25)}
                
                    ${item.custrecord_njt_packing_list_det_item}
                    <#if item.custrecord_njt_packing_list_det_desc?has_content>
${item.custrecord_njt_packing_list_det_desc}</#if>
                
                ${item.custrecord_njt_packing_list_det_package!""}
                ${item.custrecord_njt_packing_list_det_unit}
                ${item.custrecord_njt_packing_list_det_bqty!""}
                ${item.custrecord_njt_packing_list_det_tbox!""}
                ${item.custrecord_njt_packing_list_det_tqty!""}
            
            </#list>

        
    

    
    <#if !itemBatch?has_next>
    
    
        

             
        
        

            
                
                    

                        TOTAL NUMBER OF BOXES
                        ${record.custrecord_njt_packing_list_tota_box!""}
                    
                    

                        TOTAL NUMBER OF PALLET
                        ${record.custrecord_njt_packing_pallete!""}
                    
                    

                        TOTAL NET WEIGHT
                        ${record.custrecord_njt_total_net_weight!""}
                    
                    

                        TOTAL GROSS WEIGHT
                        ${record.custrecord_njt_total_gross_weight!""}
                    
                
            
            
                PALLET. ${record.custrecord_njt_packing_pallete!""}
            
        
    
    </#if>



<#if itemBatch?has_next>
    
</#if>
</#list>
